Brandblue-600.$description: Brand Color, Resting State (Default) of actions

neutral-950.$description:
The Complete Slate Scale (Add these to Core Primitives):

slate-50: #F8FAFC (Use: Light mode subtle backgrounds)

slate-100: #F1F5F9

slate-200: #E2E8F0 (Use: Light mode borders)

slate-300: #CBD5E1

slate-400: #94A3B8 (Use: Dark mode muted text)

slate-500: #64748B (Use: Light mode secondary text)

slate-600: #475569

slate-700: #334155 (Use: Dark mode elevated cards/dropdowns)

slate-800: #1E293B (Use: Dark mode base cards)

slate-900: #0F172A (Use: Dark mode deep page background)

slate-950: #020617 (Use: Dark mode highest contrast/borders)
